selfHealing.title: Self-Healing Engine
selfHealing.subtitle: Automatically resolve approved operational problems with risk-based execution.

settings.title: Intelligence Settings
settings.subtitle: Learning levels, tenant isolation, and privacy principles.

internal.title: Level 1 — Internal Learning
internal.description: Aipify Group AS operational data. Full learning allowed. Highest trust. Never shared externally without approval.

pilot.title: Level 2 — Pilot Learning
pilot.description: Unonight production validation. Operational metadata only. Requires admin approval before becoming global.

customer.title: Level 3 — Customer Learning
customer.description: External customer operational patterns. Strict tenant isolation. No conversations, identities, or documents stored.

global.title: Level 4 — Global Intelligence
global.description: Approved anonymised patterns that improve every installation across the ecosystem.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant isolation model
tenantIsolation.description: Internal patterns stay internal. Pilot patterns stay with Unonight. Customer patterns remain customer-specific. Only approved global patterns are shared ecosystem-wide.

publicTrust.title: How Aipify learns safely
publicTrust.description: Aipify learns from operational metadata, not private customer content. Conversations, invoices, identities, uploaded files, and payment details are never used for shared learning. Only approved and anonymised operational patterns may improve the global Aipify system.

auditLog.title: Intelligence Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Pattern reviews and learning events across the intelligence engine.

pending.title: Pending Actions
pending.subtitle: Prepared solutions awaiting your approval before Aipify executes them safely.

approved.subtitle: Actions approved and ready for execution.

executed.title: Executed Actions
executed.subtitle: Successfully completed actions with verified outcomes.

failed.title: Failed Actions
failed.subtitle: Actions that failed, were rejected, or required rollback.

templates.title: Action Templates

policies.title: Approval Policies

reasons.supportEfficiency: Support Optimizer reduces operational load across tenants.

impacts.executiveImpact: Clearer executive context across the platform.
impacts.supportImpact: Lower support burden and faster resolution.
impacts.growthImpact: Faster Growth Partner onboarding and operations.

billingExperience.principle: Aipify supports both purchasing behaviors — pay now for speed, approve and procure for enterprise scale.

commercialPrinciple.instant: Instant Activation: fast onboarding for customers who can make immediate purchasing decisions.
commercialPrinciple.enterprise: Enterprise Procurement: structured purchasing workflows for organizations with approval requirements.
commercialPrinciple.footer: Aipify Group AS serves both customer segments equally well. From Norway. For the world.

instantActivation.title: Instant Activation
instantActivation.description: Designed for startups, freelancers, SMBs and fast-moving teams that want immediate access to Aipify.
instantActivation.message: Activate your subscription instantly and start using Aipify within minutes.

enterpriseProcurement.title: Enterprise Procurement
enterpriseProcurement.description: Built for organizations requiring purchase orders, invoicing, procurement approvals, and customized payment arrangements.
enterpriseProcurement.message: Aipify supports established procurement practices — purchase orders, DNB Invoice, bank transfer, flexible payment terms, and framework agreements for larger organizations.

smartRouting.title: How would you like to purchase Aipify?

instant.label: Instant activation
instant.description: Ideal for smaller teams and businesses.

enterprise.label: Enterprise procurement
enterprise.description: Ideal for organizations requiring invoicing or internal approvals.

paymentOperations.title: Payment Operations Center
paymentOperations.subtitle: Complete visibility and control over Aipify's global payment infrastructure.
paymentOperations.principle: Aipify should never depend on a single payment provider. The platform must remain resilient through provider diversity.
paymentOperations.foundingPrinciple: Payment infrastructure is not only about collecting money. It is about removing friction, increasing trust, and enabling global growth. Aipify Group AS. From Norway. For the world.

executive.criticalProvidersDegraded: One or more critical providers require attention.

settlements.empty: No settlement records in this category.

recommendations.settlementDelay: Review settlement batch and confirm provider payout schedule.
recommendations.webhookInterruption: Verify webhook endpoint health and replay failed events if needed.
recommendations.providerOutage: Confirm provider status page and enable failover routing if required.
recommendations.securityIncident: Review trust audit logs and confirm credential rotation status.
recommendations.operationalUpdate: No action required — monitor provider status.
recommendations.reviewRecommended: Review when convenient — no immediate customer impact expected.

audit.empty: No payment operations audit entries yet.

paymentHealth.title: Payment Provider Health Monitor
paymentHealth.subtitle: Automated monitoring for Stripe, Klarna, Vipps MobilePay, and DNB Invoice.
paymentHealth.principle: Automated monitoring keeps Aipify payment infrastructure resilient through provider diversity.
paymentHealth.emptyState: All payment providers are operating normally.

paymentAnalytics.title: Payment Analytics Center
paymentAnalytics.subtitle: Real-time visibility into payment performance across all providers.
paymentAnalytics.principle: Real-time payment visibility supports confident platform decisions without exposing customer operational records.

subscriptionOperations.title: Subscription Operations Center
subscriptionOperations.subtitle: Centralized subscription management for all Aipify customers.
subscriptionOperations.principle: Centralized subscription operations give Aipify Group AS confident control over customer lifecycle and revenue.

customerLifecycleCenter.title: Customer Lifecycle Center
customerLifecycleCenter.subtitle: Complete visibility into the customer journey from registration to long-term retention.
customerLifecycleCenter.principle: Complete lifecycle visibility supports retention, expansion, and human-led customer success.

customerJourneyAnalytics.title: Kundereiseanalyse
customerJourneyAnalytics.subtitle: Forstå hvordan kunder beveger seg gjennom Aipify for å forbedre onboarding, adopsjon, retention og vekst.
customerJourneyAnalytics.principle: Å forstå hvor kunder sliter er første steg mot ekstraordinære kundeopplevelser.
customerJourneyAnalytics.privacyNote: Reiseanalyse finnes for å forbedre kundeutfall — aldri for reklame eller salg til tredjeparter.
customerJourneyAnalytics.emptyState: Ingen reisedata funnet for valgte filtre.

productRoadmapCenter.title: Roadmap-senter
productRoadmapCenter.subtitle: Samle, prioritere, planlegge og spore produktinitiativer i Aipify-økosystemet.
productRoadmapCenter.principle: De beste produktveikartene formes av kundebehov, strategisk tenkning og disiplinert gjennomføring.

create.title: Tittel
create.placeholderDescription: Beskriv idéen, kundepåvirkning og strategisk verdi…

releaseCenter.title: Release-senter
releaseCenter.subtitle: Planlegg, dokumenter, godkjenn og kommuniser alle plattformendringer i Aipify-økosystemet.
releaseCenter.principle: Kunder skal aldri lure på hva som endret seg. Transparens bygger tillit. Kommunikasjon reduserer usikkerhet.

knowledgeEvolutionCenter.title: Knowledge Evolution Center
knowledgeEvolutionCenter.subtitle: Forbedre kontinuerlig Aipifys kunnskapskvalitet fra supportinteraksjoner, tilbakemeldinger og godkjent organisasjonskunnskap.
knowledgeEvolutionCenter.principle: Kunnskap bør forbedres kontinuerlig. Hvert løst problem er en mulighet til å hjelpe neste kunde raskere.

complianceGovernanceCenter.title: Compliance Center
complianceGovernanceCenter.subtitle: Synlighet og kontroll over compliance-aktiviteter, governance-innstillinger, godkjenninger og policyhåndhevelse.
complianceGovernanceCenter.principle: Tillit bygges gjennom ansvarlighet. Governance skal muliggjøre ansvarlig vekst, ikke unødvendig kompleksitet.

decisionCenter.title: Decision Center
decisionCenter.subtitle: AI-drevne anbefalinger for ledelse, administratorer og kundesuksessteam basert på operasjonsdata og plattforminnsikt.
decisionCenter.principle: Informasjon alene er ikke nok. Den sanne verdien av intelligens ligger i å hjelpe mennesker ta bedre beslutninger til rett tid.

playbookCenter.title: Playbook Center
playbookCenter.subtitle: Opprett gjenbrukbare operative playbooks og automatiseringer som standardiserer gjentakende forretningsprosesser.
playbookCenter.principle: De beste organisasjonene stoler ikke bare på hukommelse. De bygger repeterbare systemer som hjelper folk å prestere konsekvent og trygt.

create.name: Navn
create.placeholderDescription: Beskriv prosessen, utløsere og forventede resultater…

customerSuccessOperations.title: Customer Success Operations Center
customerSuccessOperations.subtitle: Sentralisert arbeidsområde for proaktiv kundesuksess.
customerSuccessOperations.principle: Proaktiv suksessledelse støtter retention, ekspansjon og menneskeledede kunderelasjoner.

executiveOperationsCenter.title: Executive Operations Center
executiveOperationsCenter.subtitle: Sentralt operasjonssenter som oppsummerer helse, vekst og risiko for hele organisasjonen.
executiveOperationsCenter.principle: Ledere skal forstå organisasjonens tilstand innen 60 sekunder etter innlogging.

voiceOfCustomer.title: Kundetilbakemeldingssenter
voiceOfCustomer.subtitle: Voice of the Customer — ideer, feil, frustrasjoner og muligheter fra Aipify-brukere.
voiceOfCustomer.principle: Menneskene som bruker Aipify hver dag er blant våre største innovasjonskilder.

globalAnnouncements.title: Global Announcements & Communication Center
globalAnnouncements.subtitle: Sentralisert kommunikasjon for kunder, Growth Partners, plattformadministratorer og interne team.
globalAnnouncements.principle: Tydelig, rettidig kommunikasjon bygger tillit på tvers av kunder, partnere og interne team.

revenueOperations.title: Revenue Operations
revenueOperations.subtitle: Centralized billing orchestration — activate subscriptions, synchronize permissions, and ensure customers receive immediate access after payment.
revenueOperations.principle: Customers should receive immediate value after purchase. Payment should trigger progress.
revenueOperations.foundingPrinciple: Aipify focuses on revenue activation, subscription orchestration, customer experience, and permission management — not tax or VAT reporting.

trialConversion.title: Trial converts to paid access through automated orchestration after successful payment.
trialConversion.steps: Trial → Successful Payment → Subscription Activation → Customer Notification

external.title: Aipify does not calculate taxes or perform VAT reporting.
external.note: Tax calculation and VAT reporting remain with payment providers, accounting systems, and government reporting frameworks.
